prompt_prefix: Animate this vertical comic strip into a seamless, continuous cinematic video. Chronological sequence from right to left, top to bottom panels. Advanced camera movement transitioning smoothly between scenes. High-fidelity motion physics, 4K resolution, masterpiece quality.

shot_plan.subject_motion: subtle head lift and cloth motion
shot_plan.text_handling: preserve caption and page number without distortion

pages.video_prompt: Animate this vertical comic strip into a seamless, continuous cinematic video. Chronological sequence from right to left, top to bottom panels. Advanced camera movement transitioning smoothly between scenes. High-fidelity motion physics, 4K resolution, masterpiece quality. Preserve the exact composition, character identity, scene continuity, Chinese lettering, and page number from the source image.
